title: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
content: Biniam Solomon was known for his witty and critical cartoons before the free press was closed.

content: Analysing the reasons that playmaker Phil Foden has started only four of Manchester City's past 12 games.

originalTitle: Rangers 'unequivocally condemn' Old Firm fan disorder
title: Football Fun Needs Good Manners!
content:
Hello everyone! Your kid-friendly news reporter from Africa here! Today, we have an important story about football, fans, and why it's super important to be a good sport. Football is a game many of us love, right? It's exciting to watch teams play and score goals!

Hello, Football Fans!

Football is a beautiful game. People all over the world play it and watch it. It's a game where two teams try to kick a ball into the other team's net to score points, called goals. Teams have players who wear special uniforms. They train very hard to be the best. We cheer for our favorite players and our favorite teams! People who love to watch football are called fans. Fans go to big stadiums or watch on TV. They cheer loudly for their team, which is so much fun! Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole world! Billions of people love to watch and play it.

What Happened at a Big Game?

Far, far away from us, in a country called Scotland, there are two very big football teams. One team is called Rangers. The other team is called Celtic. These two teams play against each other a lot. Their games are always very, very exciting. People even have a special name for when they play each other – they call it the "Old Firm" game. Recently, Rangers and Celtic played a very important game. It was a big competition called the Scottish Cup. Only a few teams were left, so it was a very special match. They played at a very big football field called Ibrox. This is where the Rangers team plays all their home games. Did you know? Scotland is a country that is part of the United Kingdom. It is famous for its beautiful castles and tartan clothes!

Some Fans Were Not Good Sports

Now, here's the sad part of the story. During this very big game, some of the fans did not behave well. This is called "fan disorder." What does "fan disorder" mean? It means some people were too loud, maybe pushing, or throwing things. These actions are not kind. They are not fair play. It's like when you play a game with your friends, and someone starts to shout or cheat. It makes the game not fun anymore for everyone. When fans behave badly, it spoils the fun for other people. It can even make people feel unsafe. This is why it's so important to be respectful. Did you know? Being a good fan means cheering for your team with all your heart, but always being polite to everyone else, even the other team's fans!

Rangers Team Says "No!" to Bad Behaviour

The Rangers team heard about what happened. They were very, very sad and upset about the bad behaviour. They said, "This is not okay!" and "We do not want this to happen!" They used a strong word to say they thought it was very, very wrong. They said they "condemn" it. This means they are saying, very loudly, that they do not like it at all. The Rangers team wants all their fans to be good sports. They want everyone to come to the stadium and have fun, safely, without any trouble. They believe that football should be about joy and excitement, not about bad behaviour or making others feel scared. They want their team and their fans to show respect. Did you know? All big sports teams want their fans to represent them well. Good fans make their team proud!

Who Will Help Make Things Right?

The people who look after all of football in Scotland are called the Scottish FA. Think of them like the big boss of all the football games in the country. The Scottish FA also heard about the fan disorder. They want to make sure this kind of bad behaviour does not happen again. So, they decided to do something important. They are going to start an "independent review." This means that someone fair and honest will look at everything that happened. This person will not be on Rangers' side or Celtic's side. They will look at all the facts, talk to people, and find out exactly what went wrong. Then, they will suggest ways to stop it from happening in the future. This is like when your teacher asks someone to help solve a problem in the classroom. They want to find a fair way to make things better for everyone. Did you know? Independent reviews are important in many parts of life. They help us learn from mistakes and make sure things are fair and just.

Why Is Being a Good Fan Important?

Football is a game that brings people together. It's about sharing the excitement, the cheers, and even the sadness when your team doesn't win. Being a good fan means you respect everyone. You respect the players, the coaches, the referees, and even the fans of the other team. Even if they are your team's rivals! Good sportsmanship is about playing fair and being kind. It's about shaking hands at the end of a game, no matter who won or lost. When everyone is a good sport, the game is more fun for everyone. It makes the players proud and makes the fans happy to be there. Did you know? Many football players from Africa play in big leagues around the world, like in Scotland! They always show great sportsmanship.

What Can YOU Do?

Even if you are a young football fan, you can help! Always remember to be kind and respectful when you play or watch games. Cheer for your team, but never be mean to others. If you see someone behaving badly, you can tell an adult. We all have a part to play in making sports fun and safe for everyone. Let's all be the best fans we can be! Let's show everyone that football is about friendship, fairness, and fantastic fun. From your friend in Africa, keep being awesome!
summary: A big football team called Rangers in Scotland is very upset because some fans behaved badly at a game and wants everyone to learn to be good sports.
whyMatters: This is important because football should be fun and safe for everyone, and bad behaviour spoils the game for other fans and makes teams sad. Learning to be a good sport helps us all be kinder people.
